name: LuxUrban Hotels Inc. 13.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: LuxUrban Hotels Inc. 13.00% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred shares with a fixed dividend rate of 13%. Holders of these shares have priority over common stockholders in dividend payments and asset distribution. The terms and features are described in the company's filings.
